_comment: Configuration for the PrimaryApplicationsOnly filter in discoverApps.ps1.

PrimaryApplicationFilters._comment_NamePatterns: Regex patterns matched against application display names. Any match causes the application to be excluded. Patterns are case-insensitive by default via the (?i) prefix.
PrimaryApplicationFilters._comment_PublisherPatterns: Regex patterns matched against the publisher field. Used together with SupportingPublisherNamePattern — an application is excluded only when its publisher matches one of these AND its name matches SupportingPublisherNamePattern.
PrimaryApplicationFilters._comment_SupportingPublisherNamePattern: Secondary name filter applied after a publisher match. Catches known supporting-component naming conventions from the publishers listed in PublisherPatterns.
